<content>
1: package wrapper
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"fmt"
6: 	"os"
7: 
8: 	wrapping "github.com/hashicorp/go-kms-wrapping/v2"
9: 	configutil "github.com/hashicorp/go-secure-stdlib/configutil/v2"
10: 	"github.com/hashicorp/go-secure-stdlib/pluginutil/v2"
11: 	"github.com/hashicorp/go-secure-stdlib/strutil"
12: 	"github.com/hashicorp/hcl"
13: )
14: 
15: // pluginsConfig is used to pre-parse any plugins stanza
16: // in the configuration file, so that we can use the correct
17: // configuration when creating the KMS plugin for reading the
18: // rest of the config.
19: type pluginsConfig struct {
20: 	Plugins struct {
21: 		ExecutionDir string `hcl:"execution_dir"`
22: 	} `hcl:"plugins"`
23: }
24: 
25: func GetWrapperFromPath(ctx context.Context, path, purpose string, opt ...configutil.Option) (wrapping.Wrapper, func() error, error) {
26: 	kmses, err := configutil.LoadConfigKMSes(path)
27: 	if err != nil {
28: 		return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("Error parsing config file: %w", err)
29: 	}
30: 	hclBytes, err := os.ReadFile(path)
31: 	if err != nil {
32: 		return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("Error reading config file: %w", err)
33: 	}
34: 	pluginsConfig, err := parsePluginsConfig(string(hclBytes))
35: 	if err != nil {
36: 		return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("Error parsing plugins stanza in config file: %w", err)
37: 	}
38: 	if pluginsConfig.Plugins.ExecutionDir != "" {
39: 		// Note, this is safe to use because configutil.WithPluginOptions invocations
40: 		// are additive with each other.
41: 		opt = append(opt, configutil.WithPluginOptions(pluginutil.WithPluginExecutionDirectory(pluginsConfig.Plugins.ExecutionDir)))
42: 	}
43: 
44: 	return getWrapper(ctx, kmses, purpose, opt...)
45: }
46: 
47: func GetWrapperFromHcl(ctx context.Context, inHcl, purpose string, opt ...configutil.Option) (wrapping.Wrapper, func() error, error) {
48: 	kmses, err := configutil.ParseKMSes(inHcl)
49: 	if err != nil {
50: 		return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("Error parsing KMS HCL: %w", err)
51: 	}
52: 	pluginsConfig, err := parsePluginsConfig(inHcl)
53: 	if err != nil {
54: 		return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("Error parsing plugins stanza in config file: %w", err)
55: 	}
56: 	if pluginsConfig.Plugins.ExecutionDir != "" {
57: 		// Note, this is safe to use because configutil.WithPluginOptions invocations
58: 		// are additive with each other.
59: 		opt = append(opt, configutil.WithPluginOptions(pluginutil.WithPluginExecutionDirectory(pluginsConfig.Plugins.ExecutionDir)))
60: 	}
61: 
62: 	return getWrapper(ctx, kmses, purpose, opt...)
63: }
64: 
65: func getWrapper(ctx context.Context, kmses []*configutil.KMS, purpose string, opt ...configutil.Option) (wrapping.Wrapper, func() error, error) {
66: 	var kms *configutil.KMS
67: 	for _, v := range kmses {
68: 		if strutil.StrListContains(v.Purpose, purpose) {
69: 			if kms != nil {
70: 				return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("Only one %q block marked for %q purpose is allowed", "kms", purpose)
71: 			}
72: 			kms = v
73: 		}
74: 	}
75: 	if kms == nil {
76: 		return nil, nil, nil
77: 	}
78: 
79: 	wrapper, cleanup, err := configutil.ConfigureWrapper(
80: 		ctx,
81: 		kms,
82: 		nil,
83: 		nil,
84: 		opt...,
85: 	)
86: 	if err != nil {
87: 		return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("Error configuring kms: %w", err)
88: 	}
89: 
90: 	return wrapper, cleanup, nil
91: }
92: 
93: func parsePluginsConfig(inHcl string) (*pluginsConfig, error) {
94: 	var conf pluginsConfig
95: 	if err := hcl.Decode(&conf, inHcl); err != nil {
96: 		return nil, err
97: 	}
98: 	return &conf, nil
99: }

(End of file - total 99 lines)
</content>
